flashcards.definition: A = P(1 + r/n)^(nt); P = principal, r = rate, n = compoundings/yr, t = years.
A = Peʳᵗ; the limit of compound interest as compounding frequency → ∞.
The initial amount of money invested or borrowed.
Effective annual rate accounting for compounding: (1 + r/n)ⁿ − 1.
Approximate doubling time ≈ 72/r (where r is the percentage rate).
